description: This brave Dumpster Fire Coin, with flames of chaos and a fearless knight, reminds us that the strongest steel is forged in the craziest fires. Dumpster Fire Challenge Coin is a bold (and kinda funny) reminder that tough times make you tougher and even messes and failures can fuel your strength.

title: Funny Golf Towel
description: CLEAN YOUR ... GOLF BALLS: A dirty golf ball can ruin your game! Cleaning them will not only give you a better grip on your club but will also reduce resistance when in the air.
